description: workspace 8a65 + STANDARD FTS on text_value_7 = Fagor
sql:
select /*+ BROADCAST_JOIN(o1, r) */ `o`.`sequential_id`, `o`.`label`
from `obj_new` `o1`
join `obj_relationship_new` `r`
  on `o1`.`id` = `r`.`object_id`
join `obj_new` `o`
  on `r`.`referenced_object_id` = `o`.`id`
where `o`.`workspace_id` = '8a6526e6-cd57-4216-bac6-358a6177d221'
  and `o1`.`workspace_id` = '8a6526e6-cd57-4216-bac6-358a6177d221'
  and `r`.`workspace_id` = '8a6526e6-cd57-4216-bac6-358a6177d221'
  and match(`o1`.`text_value_7`) against('Fagor' in boolean mode)
order by `o`.`label` asc
limit 1000
offset 0;
